name: New High Temptation Target Detected
notes: This rule triggers when a new high temptation target is detected.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is greater than or equal to 30, Temptation (custom) is less than or equal to 39
when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY New High Temptation Target Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is greater than or equal to 30, Temptation (custom) is less than or equal to 39
AND NOT when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: New High Temptation Target Detected
Event description: Detects a new high temptation target.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Target ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "Target ID" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "High Temptation Target"
Remove "Target ID" from Reference Set: "Critical Temptation Target"
